prompts.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: production source board for deterministic conversion into a 16x32 side-view pixel-art character layer atlas
Primary request: Design one coherent human adventurer with a highly readable Terraria-like side-view pixel silhouette. Show a strict 16-column action sequence: idle A, idle B, six distinct run phases, jump, fall, three tool-use phases, defensive block, hurt recoil A, hurt recoil B. Also show separable visual layers for body, short windswept hair, teal work clothes, copper-and-steel light armor, and held tool/shield silhouettes.
Input images: Image 1 is the repository's current production preview and defines outline weight, scale, and palette discipline; Image 2 defines exact 16x32 body proportions; Image 3 defines flat readable clothing treatment.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key field, no floor, no shadows, no gradient, no texture.
Style/medium: crisp authored pixel art reference board, chunky clusters, one-pixel near-black contour at target scale, no anti-aliased painting, no soft rendering.
Composition/framing: orthographic side view facing right, aligned baseline, generous spacing; five labeled-by-layout but text-free rows conceptually corresponding to body, hair, clothes, armor, held equipment; consistent body registration in every column.
Color palette: restrained project palette, warm skin, dark navy outline, teal cloth, copper orange, muted steel blue, bright amber hit accents.
Constraints: preserve exact body proportions and anchor registration across all action phases; every pose must read at 16x32; opaque hard-edged shapes only; no text, letters, numbers, grid labels, watermark, drop shadow, perspective, blur, glow, semi-transparent pixels, extra characters, scenery, UI chrome, or duplicated pose filler. Do not use #FF00FF in the subject.

Create five separate wide production pixel-art biome bands for Meadow, Forest, Cave, Mushroom Cave, and Crystal Depths. Each band needs clear far, middle, and silhouette depth, tile-palette cohesion, a readable side-view horizon, and horizontally matching left/right contours. Hard clusters only; no blur, gradients, text, characters, UI, watermark, perspective floor, or painterly detail.

Extend the generated adventurer's hard-cluster outline, teal/copper material language, and native-scale readability into five tile-palette-matched seamless parallax layers, thirteen ambient/weather/combat effect sheets, two 3x3 nine-slice sets, and six 32x32 action icons. Use only yjse-pixel-v1 palette colors, binary alpha, exact declared frame cells, integer origins, no text, no blur, no gradients, and no copied third-party art.

steps: Resize the generated source with nearest-neighbor sampling for palette analysis.
Exclude the #FF00FF chroma field from source statistics.
Quantize visible source colors to the checked-in yjse-pixel-v1 palette.
Select hair, cloth, and armor accents from deterministic family counts.
Reconstruct every runtime sprite directly at its final frame grid with Pillow pixel primitives.
Force alpha to 0 or 255 and save with stable PNG settings.
